mapper.select: SELECT sm.id, sm.resource_type AS resourceType, sm.resource_id AS resourceId, sm.owner_id AS ownerId, sm.user_id AS userId, sm.permission, sm.create_time AS createTime, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM share_member sm LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = sm.user_id WHERE sm.resource_type = #{resourceType} AND sm.resource_id = #{resourceId} ORDER BY sm.create_time ASC
